delay_reason: Due to severe psychological distress from continuous harassment and unwanted advances by my classmate.
additional_info: INCIDENT REPORT: The victim is facing continuous online harassment/stalking by a classmate named Ayush (roll number 25). The suspect is messaging on WhatsApp demanding to meet, despite the victim clearly stating "We can't meet" and refusing. This repetitive unwanted contact is causing severe discomfort and anxiety. DETECTED ISSUES: Stalking: Unwanted and persistent demands to meet. Harassment: Unwanted messages causing distress. The victim seeks immediate legal intervention and protection under applicable laws against cyber harassment and stalking.
suspect_description: Classmate named Ayush, roll number 25. He has been messaging on WhatsApp forcefully asking to meet despite repeated rejections.
